name: basecamp-daily-report
description: Basecamp Daily Report Generator — Pull project data via Basecamp CLI, generate AI-analyzed bilingual summaries, publish to Feishu Wiki, and send HTML email reports.

basecamp_account_id.title: Basecamp Account ID
basecamp_account_id.description: Your Basecamp account ID (e.g. 3609478 for Genimex)

email_recipients.title: Email Recipients
email_recipients.description: Comma-separated email addresses for report delivery (e.g. larry_li@genimexgroup.com,team@genimexgroup.com)

feishu_wiki_node.title: Feishu Wiki Node
feishu_wiki_node.description: Feishu Wiki parent node token for report storage (optional)

report_language.title: Report Language
report_language.description: Report language mode: 'bilingual' (EN primary + CN secondary), 'en', or 'cn'. Default: bilingual

basecamp_api_token.title: Basecamp API Token
basecamp_api_token.description: OAuth access token for Basecamp API (required for Cowork sandbox mode). Get it by running: security find-generic-password -s basecamp -w | base64 -d | python3 -c "import sys,json;print(json.loads(sys.stdin.read())['access_token'])"
